display_text: Shadow Demon Aghanim's Scepter: Causes Demonic Purge to break and gain 2 charges. This upgrade counters sustained fights and mobility heroes by allowing multiple applications of Demonic Purge, significantly increasing area control and disruption potential.
search_text: Shadow Demon Aghanim Scepter counter-mobility area control disruption Demonic Purge charges ultimate upgrade

display_text: Shadow Demon Aghanim's Shard: Grants Demonic Cleanse, a basic dispel that removes negative buffs and heals an ally at the end of its duration. This upgrade counters debuffs and disables, transforming Shadow Demon into a powerful support with anti-debuff capabilities.
search_text: Shadow Demon Aghanim Shard counter-debuff anti-disable Demonic Cleanse heal basic dispel
